title: PCT Namespace Registry
description: The authoritative registry of all registered extension namespace prefixes in the PCT ecosystem. Maintained by DPG Labs as the authoring organisation of the PCT specification.

registry_authority.name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group

namespaces._comment: === RESERVED PREFIXES (DPG Labs core - not available for registration) ===
namespaces.registrant_name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group
namespaces.regulatory_framework: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)

fields.name: minimum_necessary
fields.description: Attests that data access is limited to the minimum necessary to accomplish the intended purpose under HIPAA.

fields.name: phi_flag
fields.description: Indicates the data constitutes Protected Health Information (PHI) under HIPAA.

fields.name: permitted_disclosure
fields.description: The HIPAA permitted disclosure category under which this data may be used or disclosed without individual authorisation.

fields.name: baa_in_place
fields.description: Confirms a Business Associate Agreement is in place for this data processing relationship.

namespaces.registrant_name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group
namespaces.regulatory_framework: Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA)

fields.name: ict_risk_classification
fields.description: The ICT risk classification level assigned to this processing activity under DORA.

fields.name: third_party_flag
fields.description: Indicates involvement of a third-party ICT service provider subject to DORA oversight.

fields.name: incident_trigger
fields.description: Indicates whether this processing activity could trigger a DORA major incident report.

namespaces.registrant_name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group
namespaces.regulatory_framework: UK Data Use and Access Act (DUAA)

fields.name: access_condition
fields.description: The data access condition applicable under the DUAA.

fields.name: trusted_research_env
fields.description: Indicates processing occurs within a Trusted Research Environment as defined under the DUAA.

namespaces.registrant_name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group
namespaces.regulatory_framework: Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations (PECR)

fields.name: tracking_consent
fields.description: Indicates consent has been obtained for tracking technologies under PECR Regulation 6.

fields.name: comms_data_flag
fields.description: Indicates the data constitutes communications data subject to PECR.

fields.name: marketing_permission
fields.description: Indicates permission for direct electronic marketing has been obtained under PECR Regulation 22.

namespaces.registrant_name: DPG Labs / The Data Privacy Group
namespaces.regulatory_framework: EU Artificial Intelligence Act

fields.name: risk_tier
fields.description: AI risk classification under the EU AI Act. Values: minimal, limited, high, unacceptable.

fields.name: human_oversight_required
fields.description: Indicates human oversight is required before any AI output is actioned.

fields.name: prohibited_use_check
fields.description: Attests the intended use has been checked against prohibited AI applications.

fields.name: training_data_flag
fields.description: Indicates the data may be used to train or fine-tune a model.

fields.name: conformity_assessment_ref
fields.description: Reference to the conformity assessment documentation for high-risk AI systems.

summary.review_method: AI-assisted legal review using current legal sources
summary.note: x-ai-us-eo renamed to x-ai-us-fed (EO 14110 rescinded). x-nist-csf split into x-nist-csf, x-nist-pf, x-fedramp, x-cmmc. New namespaces added: x-dpa-le, x-gdpr-national.
